description_long: This is a set of three modern storage cabinets, each with a rectangular form and clean, minimalist lines. The leftmost cabinet is light-colored and features three doors, two of which are open to reveal internal shelving and compartments. The central cabinet is a similar light color and appears to be partially disassembled, with its top and side panels separated and laid out in front. The rightmost cabinet is a dark color, possibly black or charcoal, with three vertical handles that suggest three separate compartments. All cabinets are raised slightly off the ground on small feet, and the doors have simple, vertical handles. The materials appear to be a combination of wood or engineered wood, with metal handles and possibly plastic or metal feet.
description: A trio of modern, rectangular storage cabinets in light and dark finishes, featuring multiple doors, internal shelving, and minimalist handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three cabinets, with open doors on the left cabinet revealing shelves and compartments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinets and the arrangement of separated panels in the center.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the cabinets and the disassembled panels laid out in front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the thickness of the cabinets and the open doors on the leftmost unit.
